creator: mmokhi@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Fredrik Eriksson from comment #8)
Okay. Cause mysql5.7.13 is seemed to be released recent days, so I'll close bug as "works as intended".
And as you said (and I myself saw in PR on bugs.mysql.com), by updating to 5.7.13 it'll be fixed by upstream :)
I will prepare a PR for updating port's mysql to 5.7.13 soon.
